overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open world game showing a character in cowboy attire walking along a dirt trail through rolling grassland. The character passes an abandoned wooden cart and encounters a horseback rider traveling in the opposite direction under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie grassland with distant smoke plume

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through tall grass toward a large bare tree ahead

entered.detail: thin column of smoke rising in the distance against the sky
tall leafless tree standing prominently in the center of the path ahead
worn dirt trail cutting through the tall grass
grassy slope with exposed rock formations

segments.scene_description: The character walks through open grassland under a clear midday sky, following a dirt trail toward a large bare tree. A distant smoke plume rises on the left horizon, and rocky hills flank the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: prairie trail with abandoned wooden wagon

events.description: abandoned wooden wagon comes into view on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, approaching and passing an abandoned wooden wagon on the right

entered.detail: weathered wooden cart with broken wheels sitting beside the trail
hazy mountain range visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character passes the large bare tree as it moves to the left, approaching an abandoned wooden wagon on the right side of the trail. Distant mountains become visible on the horizon ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with pine trees and distant mountains

events.description: rider on horseback appears ahead on the trail
horseback rider passes by on the right going opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking forward as a horseback rider approaches from ahead and passes by on the right

notable_agents.action: riding a horse toward the camera then passing by on the right side of the trail

entered.detail: group of tall pine trees lining the horizon ahead
boulder partially covered by grass on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: A rider on horseback approaches from the distance and passes by on the right, traveling opposite to the character's direction. The landscape opens up to reveal clusters of pine trees and distant mountains as the character continues along the winding dirt path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt trail that transitions from an open grassland toward a more rugged mountain vista. It begins with the character walking under a clear midday sky toward a large bare tree, with a distant plume of smoke rising against a backdrop of rocky hills. As the camera passes the tree, the view shifts to reveal an abandoned wooden wagon on the right side of the path while distant mountains emerge on the horizon. The scene then opens further to reveal clusters of pine trees as a horseback rider approaches from the distance and passes by in the opposite direction. Finally, the camera continues to follow the character along the trail as the landscape expands to fully showcase the towering peaks in the distance.
